summary: Stage 9 now reconciles release/0.7.1, runs the seven-task Plan 12 on one immutable candidate, and ends when Task 7 fast-forwards and closes Plan 12. The run sheet performs no separate release mutation, checkpoint, Wave 4 closure, or milestone closure.

review_basis.process: Reviewed with the lean Plan 12, autonomous prompt, controller, and canonical AWS deployment runbook.

resolved_findings.resolution: Removed active hosted-CI and Wardline authority surfaces from Stage 9.
Removed the extra Major Checkpoint 6 and all Task 8, Task 9, Wave 4, and milestone closeout work after Plan 12.

verification: Stage 9 delegates Tasks 1 through 6 and the sole Task 7 release transition to Plan 12.
Plan 12 closure is explicitly the endpoint for this job.
Run-sheet Bash syntax and git diff --check pass.

review_history.summary: Stage 9 was reduced to the work required to deliver, clean up, release, and close the AWS integration.
